source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Air at 35\circ\text{C}, 105 kPa flows in a 100-mm × 150-mm rectangular duct in a heating system. The mass flow rate is 0.015 kg/s. What are the velocity of the air flowing in the duct and the volume flow rate?
